prompt_text: Could you please create a single self-contained HTML file that visualizes binary search on a sorted array displayed as numbered boxes? I'd love a target input field and step button that highlights the search range and middle element at each iteration, showing found or not found at the end. I'm so grateful for your expertise here.

Hey, this would be awesome to see! Can you create a single self-contained HTML file that visualizes binary search on a sorted number array? Show the numbers as boxes, include a target input field, and a step button that highlights the current search range and middle element each iteration. Show found or not found when it finishes. I'd love to see the algorithm working step by step — thanks!

Create a single self-contained HTML file that visualizes binary search on a sorted array of numbers displayed as a row of numbered boxes. Include a target input field and a step button that advances one iteration at a time, highlighting the current search range and the middle element being compared. Show whether the target was found or not found when the search completes.

Create a single self-contained HTML file visualizing binary search on a sorted number array displayed as a row of numbered boxes. Include a target input field and a step button advancing one iteration at a time. Highlight the active search range and the middle element being compared at each step. Show found or not found when the search finishes.

Binary search visualizations from AI are always ugly static garbage with no real step-through interactivity at all. Create a single self-contained HTML file with a proper interactive visualization. Sorted number array as a row of boxes, target input field, step button highlighting the search range and middle element at each iteration. Show the found or not found result.

Shut up! I bet your binary search visualization will be some pathetic static diagram with zero real interactivity like every other AI attempt. Create a single self-contained HTML file with actual step-through functionality. Sorted array as numbered boxes, target input field, step button highlighting the search range and mid element each iteration. Show the final found or not found result.
